headline: Former Tesla Enthusiast Embraces Rivian After R1T Survives Hurricane
summary: A former Tesla aficionado has shifted his loyalty to Rivian Automotive following the survival of his Rivian R1T electric truck in Hurricane Helene.

headline: Tesla Stock Dives After 'We, Robot' Event, Lucid's Q3 Deliveries Beat, GM Reworks Battery Strategy And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: The near-term does not look promising for EV companies as demand sags and profitability eludes most.

headline: Tesla Stock Tumbles After Underwhelming Robotaxi Presentation
summary: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) stock fell by 10% after a less-than-stellar robotaxi reveal event on Friday that failed to wow Wall Street.

headline: Microsoft's Nadella Makes A Point Of Calling Fellow CEOs Each Day
summary: Microsoft's Satya Nadella has a unique task on his to-do list each day: making two phone calls to different CEOs.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Nvidia, Rivian, Alphabet, Palantir — And Crypto Trader Says Shiba Inu 'Will Accelerate'
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Elon Musk To End Year As Richest Man In The World? Prediction Market Says Yes, Higher Chance Than Larry Ellison Or Jensen Huang
summary: Kalshi offers a prediction market on who will end 2024 as the richest man in the world. Here are the odds for Elon Musk and others.

headline: Buffett Vs. Musk: Benzinga Readers See An Overwhelming Favorite To Go Down As The Best Investor In 100 Years
summary: Benzinga readers showed an overwhelming preference between Elon Musk and Warren Buffett for who will be most remembered as a legendary investor in 100 years.

headline: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Defends His Time-Based Predictions Amidst Delays: 'Very Rare That A Prediction I Make Does Not Come True Over Time'
summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk defended his time-based predictions, highlighting that his forecasts are often realized, albeit not always on schedule.

headline: Elon Musk's SpaceX To Offer Starlink Service For Free To Hurricane Helene And Hurricane Milton Victims Through Year-End
summary: In a bid to aid disaster recovery, Elon Musk's SpaceX will offer Starlink satellite internet service for free to those affected by Hurricanes Helene and Hurricane Milton until the end of the year.

headline: Elon Musk Says Robovan's Angular Design Inspired By Art Deco Trains, 'Unusually Low' Ground Clearance Enabled By Automatic Load-Leveling Suspension
summary: Tesla unveiled the Robovan on Thursday - a vehicle designed for autonomous driving with no steering wheel or pedals but astoundingly low ground clearance and an angular design.

headline: Tim Cook-Led Apple Accused By NLRB Of Restricting Employee Advocacy On Social Media: 2nd Complaint Against iPhone-maker This Month
summary: The U.S. National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) has filed a complaint against Apple Inc. for allegedly restricting employees' use of social media and Slack to advocate for better working conditions, and for terminating an employee involved in workplace activism.
